summary: Completed comprehensive testing of API Response Envelope, API Versioning, Dead-letter Visibility, and Outbox Hardening features. All 22 tests pass. All new features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features verified. Response envelope middleware wraps all /api/ JSON responses in {ok, data, meta} format. Error responses use {ok: false, error: {...}, meta}. /api/v1/ path rewrite works transparently. Unique index on (event_id, handler) exists for idempotency hardening.
features_verified: 1. EventPublisher abstraction — outbox_consumer.py lines 204-212 use get_transport() from event_publisher.py instead of raw Redis push
2. Idempotency hardening — MongoDB unique index on (event_id, handler) confirmed + Redis fast-path dedup in _is_already_processed()
3. Dead-letter visibility — GET /api/admin/outbox/dead-letter returns list + stats breakdown (total, showing, breakdown_by_type, events)
4. Dead-letter retry-all — POST /api/admin/outbox/dead-letter/retry-all works (with optional event_type filter)
5. Stats by type — GET /api/admin/outbox/stats-by-type returns breakdown by event_type and status
6. API Response Envelope — ALL /api/ JSON responses wrapped in {ok, data, meta} format
7. Error envelope — error responses wrapped in {ok: false, error: {code, message, details}, meta}
9. Meta fields — trace_id, timestamp, latency_ms, api_version present in all wrapped responses
13. X-API-Version header — present on all /api/v1/ responses
14. X-API-Deprecated headers — present on unversioned /api/ paths (X-API-Deprecated, X-API-Sunset, X-API-Upgrade)
15. Existing outbox health endpoint still works at /api/admin/outbox/health
16. Outbox manual trigger still works at /api/admin/outbox/trigger

code_review_findings.response_envelope_middleware: /app/backend/app/middleware/response_envelope.py — Clean implementation with proper exclusions, re-entrant safety check, correct JSON parsing
code_review_findings.api_versioning_middleware: /app/backend/app/middleware/api_versioning.py — Transparent path rewrite, deprecation headers on unversioned paths, proper header exposure in CORS
code_review_findings.event_publisher: /app/backend/app/infrastructure/event_publisher.py — Clean transport abstraction with DomainEvent dataclass, swappable transport layer
code_review_findings.outbox_consumer: /app/backend/app/infrastructure/outbox_consumer.py lines 204-212 — Correctly uses get_transport() from event_publisher instead of raw Redis
code_review_findings.idempotency: /app/backend/app/tasks/outbox_consumers.py lines 55-111 — Two-layer idempotency: Redis fast-path + MongoDB unique constraint, handles DuplicateKeyError
code_review_findings.mongodb_index: Unique index 'event_id_1_handler_1' exists on outbox_consumer_results collection
